TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wakaba == u sulit nu Hulam: "wukapa", : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Wakaba. u kasalumaluma' nu Wakaba sa, 331 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,267 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,215 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 52 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 93%, Pangcah(Amis) 1%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, zumazuma 1%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni. tuud ku Paywan a tademaw itiniay a niyazu'. u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == wakaba == u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam: "wukapa", : u siwkaj nu nijazuʔ~ʡ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu wakaba. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu wakaba sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *,*** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *,*** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u asip nu ʦidəkaj a tadəmaw u kasabinaʦadan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, paŋʦaħ(amis) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazuʔ~ʡ nu pajwan u pajwan a nijazuʔ~ʡ kujni. tuud ku pajwan a tadəmaw itiniaj a nijazuʔ~ʡ. u ʦidəkaj nu tajwan a inʦumin: u sakizaja a binaʦadan aziħan i u paŋʦaħ(amis) a binaʦadan aziħan i u tajar~ɾ a binaʦadan aziħan i u pajwan a binaʦadan aziħan i u bunun a binaʦadan aziħan i u pijuma a binaʦadan aziħan i u *ukaj a binaʦadan aziħan i u takuku a binaʦadan aziħan i u səjək a binaʦadan aziħan i u sajsia a binaʦadan aziħan i u kabar~ɾan a binaʦadan aziħan i u kanakanabu a binaʦadan aziħan i u r~ɾaar~ɾuwa a binaʦadan aziħan i u saw a binaʦadan aziħan i u ʦħou a binaʦadan aziħan i u tau a binaʦadan aziħan i
S.FORM: == Wakaba == u sulit nu Hulam: "wukapa", : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Wakaba. u kasalumaluma' nu Wakaba sa, 331 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,267 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 1,215 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 52 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u asip nu cidekay a tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 93%, Pangcah(Amis) 1%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, zumazuma 1%. u niyazu' nu Paywan u Paywan a niyazu' kuyni. tuud ku Paywan a tademaw itiniay a niyazu'. u cidekay nu Taywan a Incumin: u Sakizaya a binacadan azihan i u Pangcah(Amis) a binacadan azihan i u Tayal a binacadan azihan i u Paywan a binacadan azihan i u Bunun a binacadan azihan i u Piyuma a binacadan azihan i u Rukay a binacadan azihan i u Takuku a binacadan azihan i u Sejek a binacadan azihan i u Saysia a binacadan azihan i u Kabalan a binacadan azihan i u Kanakanabu a binacadan azihan i u Laaluwa a binacadan azihan i u Saw a binacadan azihan i u Chou a binacadan azihan i u Tau a binacadan azihan i
S.PHON: == wakaba == u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam: "wukapa", : u siwkaj nu nijazuʔ~ʡ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu wakaba. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu wakaba sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *,*** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *,*** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u asip nu ʦidəkaj a tadəmaw u kasabinaʦadan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, paŋʦaħ(amis) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijazuʔ~ʡ nu pajwan u pajwan a nijazuʔ~ʡ kujni. tuud ku pajwan a tadəmaw itiniaj a nijazuʔ~ʡ. u ʦidəkaj nu tajwan a inʦumin: u sakizaja a binaʦadan aziħan i u paŋʦaħ(amis) a binaʦadan aziħan i u tajar~ɾ a binaʦadan aziħan i u pajwan a binaʦadan aziħan i u bunun a binaʦadan aziħan i u pijuma a binaʦadan aziħan i u *ukaj a binaʦadan aziħan i u takuku a binaʦadan aziħan i u səjək a binaʦadan aziħan i u sajsia a binaʦadan aziħan i u kabar~ɾan a binaʦadan aziħan i u kanakanabu a binaʦadan aziħan i u r~ɾaar~ɾuwa a binaʦadan aziħan i u saw a binaʦadan aziħan i u ʦħou a binaʦadan aziħan i u tau a binaʦadan aziħan i
